Lefts

Rights

OR 15-7 04-6 73-5 62-4 51-3 40-2 37-1 length 7

AND-NOT none
OR-NOT none

Left longest: 2
Right longest: 7

Left winner: I win, C none, AND lost, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT none
Right winner: I none, C none, AND none, OR win, XOR lost, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT none

Longest Left: I 2-0 3-1
Longest Right: OR 15-7 04-6 73-5 62-4 51-3 40-2 37-1

7 + 2 = 9 > 8
Left will be truncated to length 8 - 7 = 1

Truncated left: I 2-0 truncated
Truncated right: OR 15-7 04-6 73-5 62-4 51-3 40-2 37-1

Tentative from right

0 I 2

0 I 2
1 OR 37
2 OR 40

Matched
0 I 2
1 OR 37
2 OR 40
3 OR 51
4 OR 62
5 OR 73
6 OR 04
7 OR 15

Applying to 00011000
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 2 = 0
1 OR 37 = OR(I 3,I 7) = OR(1,0) = 1
2 OR 40 = OR(I 4,I 0) = OR(1,0) = 1
3 OR 51 = OR(I 5,I 1) = OR(0,0) = 0
4 OR 62 = OR(I 6,I 2) = OR(0,0) = 0
5 OR 73 = OR(I 7,I 3) = OR(0,1) = 1
6 OR 04 = OR(I 0,I 4) = OR(0,1) = 1
7 OR 15 = OR(I 1,I 5) = OR(0,0) = 0

\boxed{01100110}
